ops.title: Summarizer 429/529 retry with retry-after backoff
ops.description: SummarizerClient::call (crates/ccs-summarizer/src/client.rs:71-105): retry HTTP 429/529 up to 2× honoring retry-after (fallback 2s, 8s) inside the existing 120s envelope. Closes the live secondary finding from F1 (rate-limit burst silently thins the staged plan; decide() fails soft to Keep). Plan: two-notes-shimmying-zephyr Phase 0.

ops.text: call_retries_429_then_succeeds green in ccs-summarizer (mocked 429 then 200, retry-after honored)
non-retryable statuses still fail soft without retry
